translations.### linkyee — 使用 GitHub Pages 快速免費建立個人類: ### linkyee — Quickly and freely create a personal LinkTree-like page using GitHub Pages
translations.### 開始使用 — 部署在 GitHub Pages\n\n: ### Getting Started — Deploy on GitHub Pages
translations.#### 步驟 1. 點擊 linkyee 範本庫右上角的「Use this t: #### Step 1. Click the "Use this template" button at the top right of the linkyee template repo -> "Create a new repository":
translations.#### 步驟 2. 勾選「Include all branches」，輸入您想: #### Step 2. Check "Include all branches," enter your desired GitHub Pages repository name, and click "Create repository":
translations.#### 步驟 4. 前往 Settings -> Actions -> Gen: #### Step 4. Go to Settings -> Actions -> General, and make sure to select the following options:
translations.#### 步驟 5. 前往 Settings -> Pages，確認 GitHu: #### Step 5. Go to Settings -> Pages, and confirm the GitHub Pages branch is set to "gh-pages":
translations.#### 步驟 6. 前往 Settings -> Actions，等待第一次部: #### Step 6. Go to Settings -> Actions, and wait for the first deployment to complete:
translations.#### 步驟 7. 訪問 GitHub Pages 網址，確認 Fork 是否: #### Step 7. Visit the GitHub Pages URL to confirm if the Fork was successful:
translations.#### 等待 Fork 完成。初次建立時可能會遇到部署錯誤，這是由於 Fork: #### Wait for the Fork to complete. You may encounter deployment errors initially due to permission issues with the Forked repository. Next, we will follow the steps to adjust this.
translations.#### 自訂風格樣式、修改預設主題\n\n: #### Customize Styles and Modify the Default Theme
translations.***我以把成果開源並打包成 Template Repo (linkyee)，有: ***I have open-sourced the project and packaged it as a Template Repo (linkyee). Friends who need it can directly Fork to quickly deploy and use it.***
translations.***請注意，每次修改文件後，您需要等待 GitHub Actions 完成自動: ***Please note that after each file modification, you need to wait for GitHub Actions to complete the automatic build and the page build and deployment tasks.***
translations.***重新整理頁面以使變更生效。🚀***\n\n: ***Refresh the page to apply the changes. 🚀***
translations.**只能寄存靜態檔案資源：** HTML, CSS, JavaScript, 字: **Can only host static file resources:** HTML, CSS, JavaScript, font files, image files, PDFs, audio files, text files, etc.
translations.**支援動態變數，例如我預設建了 Medium 追蹤者、Github Repo: **Supports dynamic variables, such as default Medium followers and GitHub repo star count variables, which can be automatically inserted and updated on the page.** 🚀🚀🚀
translations.**沒錯，您可以使用像 ChatGPT 這樣的 GenAI 工具，來幫助您創建自: **Yes, you can use GenAI tools like ChatGPT to help you create a custom link page! (The default style was also generated by ChatGPT)**
translations.**網站(Repo)大小不得超過：** 1 GB 這猜測也是軟限制，因為我的 G: **The website (repo) size must not exceed:** 1 GB. This is likely a soft limit, as my GitHub Pages Jekyll repo is already nearly 5 GB.
translations.**選擇完畢後，點擊 Save 按鈕儲存變更。**\n\n: **After making your selection, click the Save button to save the changes.**
translations.*GitHub Pages Repo 名稱就會是訪問網址。*\n\n: *The GitHub Pages repo name will be the access URL.*
translations.*「Your site is live at: XXXX」訊息即為您的 GitH: *The message "Your site is live at: XXXX" is your GitHub Pages public access URL.*
translations.*如果將 Repo 名稱輸入為 `your-username.github.io: *If you name the repo `your-username.github.io`, it will become the direct URL for your GitHub Pages site.*
translations.*如果您已有 `your-username.github.io` Repo，那麼: *If you already have a `your-username.github.io` repo, the GitHub Pages URL will be `your-username.github.io/Repo-Name`.*
translations.- **Can only host static file resources::
- **Can only host static file resources:** HTML, CSS, JavaScript, font files, image files, PDFs, audio files, text files, etc.

- **The website (repo) size must not exceed:** 1 GB. This is likely a soft limit, as my GitHub Pages Jekyll repo is already nearly 5 GB.

- **Longest deployment time:** 10 minutes

- **Maximum deployments per hour:** 10 times (soft limit)

- **Monthly Traffic Limit:** 100 GB (soft limit)

- Too many requests may result in an HTTP 429 response.
translations.- ./themes/ `YOUR_THEME`\n\n- Update to:
- ./themes/ `YOUR_THEME`

- Update to `theme:YOUR_THEME` in the config.yml file
translations.- Actions permissions: Allow all actions:
- Actions permissions: Allow all actions and reusable workflows

- Workflow permissions: Read and write permissions
translations.- Direct Deployment on GitHub Pages: Sta:
- Direct Deployment on GitHub Pages: Stable and Free

- Full control over the HTML source files allows you to freely modify layout, styles, remove ads, and copyright notices; *(the default style was created using GenAI ChatGPT)*

- Support Custom Domains

- **Supports dynamic variables, such as default Medium followers and GitHub repo star count variables, which can be automatically inserted and updated on the page.** 🚀🚀🚀

- Fast Page Loading

- You can complete the setup and deployment in just a few simple steps according to this article.
translations.> ***I have open-sourced the project and: > ***I have open-sourced the project and packaged it as a Template Repo (linkyee). Friends who need it can directly Fork to quickly deploy and use it.***
translations.> ***Please note that after each file mo: > ***Please note that after each file modification, you need to wait for GitHub Actions to finish the automatic build and the page build and deployment tasks.***
translations.> ***Refresh the page to apply the chang: > ***Refresh the page to apply the changes. 🚀***
> *If you already have a `your-username.github.io` repo, the GitHub Pages URL will be `your-username.github.io/Repo-Name`.*
translations.> *If you name the repo `your-username.g: > *If you name the repo `your-username.github.io`, it will become the direct URL for your GitHub Pages site.*
translations.> *The GitHub Pages repo name will be th: > *The GitHub Pages repo name will be the access URL.*
translations.> *The message \"Your site is live at: X: > *The message "Your site is live at: XXXX" is your GitHub Pages public access URL.*
translations.> Congratulations! Deployment successful: > Congratulations! Deployment successful. You can now edit the configuration file and replace it with your own information. 🎉🎉🎉
translations.Actions permissions: Allow all actions a: Actions permissions: Allow all actions and reusable workflows
translations.Github Pages 是由 Github 提供的免費靜態頁面寄存服務，所有: GitHub Pages is a free static site hosting service provided by GitHub. All GitHub Free accounts can use it directly for Public Repos, while Private Repos require a paid GitHub account upgrade.
translations.Workflow permissions: Read and write per: Workflow permissions: Read and write permissions
translations.[我使用 Github Pages 部署的 Jekyll Blog](../a0: [My Jekyll Blog deployed with Github Pages](../a0c08d579ab1/) ➡️ [**ZhgChgLi**](https://zhgchg.li/){:target="_blank"}
translations.[無痛轉移 Medium 到 Github Pages](../a0c08d57: [Painless Migration from Medium to GitHub Pages](../a0c08d579ab1/)
translations.```yaml\n# 網站配置 \n\n# 主題名稱，對應至目錄：./them: ```yaml # Website Configuration # Theme name, corresponds to directory: ./theme/xxxx theme: default # HTML language setting lang: "en" # Plugins (implemented in ./plugins/PLUGIN_NAME) # Use {{ vars.PLUGIN_NAME }} in the settings below # Plugin output can be used below, e.g.: {{vars.MediumFollowersCountPlugin}} plugins: # Automatically get Medium followers count - MediumFollowersCountPlugin: username: zhgchgli # Automatically get GitHub repository stars count - GithubRepoStarsCountPlugin: - ZhgChgLi/ZMarkupParser - ZhgChgLi/ZReviewTender - ZhgChgLi/ZMediumToMarkdown - ZhgChgLi/linkyee # Google Analytics tracking ID google_analytics_id: # HTML title title: "ZhgChgLi's Link Collection" # Avatar image path avatar: "./images/profile.jpeg" # Name block text name: "@zhgchgli" # Tagline block text tagline: >- An iOS, web, and automation developer from Taiwan who loves sharing, traveling, and writing. # Links list # icon: use Font Awesome icons (https://fontawesome.com/search?o=r&m=free) # text: text shown on the link # title: link title # url: link URL # alt: alternative text (for accessibility) # target: `_blank` opens in new tab, `_self` opens in the same page links: - link: icon: "fa-brands fa-medium" text: "Tech Blog ({{vars.MediumFollowersCountPlugin}} Followers)" url: "https://blog.zhgchg.li" alt: "ZhgChgLi's Tech Blog" title: "ZhgChgLi's Tech Blog" target: "_blank" - link: icon: "fa-brands fa-medium" text: "Travel Journal ({{vars.MediumFollowersCountPlugin}} Followers)" url: "https://medium.com/ztravel" alt: "ZhgChgLi's Travel Journal" title: "ZhgChgLi's Travel Journal" target: "_blank" - link: icon: "fa-solid fa-rss" text: "Personal Website" url: "https://zhgchg.li/" alt: "ZhgChgLi's Website" title: "ZhgChgLi's Website" target: "_blank" - link: icon: "fa-brands fa-swift" text: "ZMarkupParser ({{vars.GithubRepoStarsCountPlugin['ZhgChgLi/ZMarkupParser']}} Stars)" url: "https://github.com/ZhgChgLi/ZMarkupParser" alt: "ZMarkupParser is a pure Swift library for converting HTML strings into NSAttributedString with custom styles." title: "ZMarkupParser is a pure Swift library for converting HTML strings into NSAttributedString with custom styles." target: "_blank" - link: icon: "fa-brands fa-app-store-ios" text: "ZReviewTender ({{vars.GithubRepoStarsCountPlugin['ZhgChgLi/ZReviewTender']}} Stars)" url: "https://github.com/ZhgChgLi/ZReviewTender" alt: "ZReviewTender is a tool to fetch app reviews from App Store and Google Play Console and integrate them into workflows." title: "ZReviewTender is a tool to fetch app reviews from App Store and Google Play Console and integrate them into workflows." target: "_blank" - link: icon: "fa-brands fa-markdown" text: "ZMediumToMarkdown ({{vars.GithubRepoStarsCountPlugin['ZhgChgLi/ZMediumToMarkdown']}} Stars)" url: "https://github.com/ZhgChgLi/ZMediumToMarkdown" alt: "ZMediumToMarkdown is a powerful tool to easily download and convert Medium articles to Markdown format." title: "ZMediumToMarkdown is a powerful tool to easily download and convert Medium articles to Markdown format." target: "_blank" - link: icon: "fa-brands fa-github" text: "linkyee ({{vars.GithubRepoStarsCountPlugin['ZhgChgLi/linkyee']}} Stars)" url: "https://github.com/ZhgChgLi/linkyee" alt: "linkyee is a fully customizable and open-source LinkTree alternative that can be deployed directly on GitHub Pages." title: "linkyee is a fully customizable and open-source LinkTree alternative that can be deployed directly on GitHub Pages." target: "_blank" # Social media links list # icon: use Font Awesome icons (https://fontawesome.com/search?o=r&m=free) # title: link title # url: social media link URL # alt: alternative text (for accessibility) # target: `_blank` opens in new tab, `_self` opens in the same page socials: - social: icon: "fa-brands fa-medium" url: "https://blog.zhgchg.li" title: "ZhgChgLi's Medium" alt: "ZhgChgLi's Medium" target: "_blank" - social: icon: "fa-brands fa-github" url: "https://github.com/ZhgChgLi" title: "ZhgChgLi's GitHub" alt: "ZhgChgLi's GitHub" target: "_blank" - social: icon: "fa-brands fa-twitter" url: "https://twitter.com/zhgchgli" title: "ZhgChgLi's Twitter" alt: "ZhgChgLi's Twitter" target: "_blank" - social: icon: "fa-brands fa-linkedin" url: "https://www.linkedin.com/in/zhgchgli/" title: "ZhgChgLi's LinkedIn" alt: "ZhgChgLi's LinkedIn" target: "_blank" - social: icon: "fa-brands fa-instagram" url: "https://www.instagram.com/zhgchgli/" title: "Instagram" alt: "ZhgChgLi's Instagram" target: "_blank" - social: icon: "fa-solid fa-envelope" url: "zhgchgli@gmail.com" title: "Email: zhgchgli@gmail.com" alt: "zhgchgli@gmail.com" target: "_blank" # Footer text footer: > Welcome to my website! Follow me on Medium or GitHub for the latest updates, or stay connected on Instagram and LinkedIn. # Footer copyright statement # Linkyee is a 100% free open-source project—you can freely modify the copyright statement. :) copyright: > © 2024 ZhgChgLi. Powered by linkyee. ```
translations.```yaml\nschedule:\n - cron: '0 0 * * *':
```yaml
schedule:
 - cron: '0 0 * * *' # Run daily at midnight 00:00 (UTC)
```
translations.使用 GitHub Pages 快速建立自己的連結頁面，100% 免費、客製化並: Create Your Own Link Page Quickly with GitHub Pages: 100% Free, Customizable, and Supports Custom Domains
translations.可以找我之前的文章「 [**Github Pages 自訂網域教學**](../: You can refer to my previous article "[**Github Pages Custom Domain Tutorial**](../483af5d93297/)" for a step-by-step guide from purchasing to binding a domain. You can also buy a domain through [**my Namecheap referral link**](https://namecheap.pxf.io/P0jdZQ){:target="_blank"} — I will receive a small commission, which helps me continue contributing to open source projects.
translations.在 config.yml 文件中更新為 `theme:YOUR_THEME`\n: Update to `theme:YOUR_THEME` in the config.yml file
translations.如果不需要定時重新部署，可以直接刪除 `schedule` 區塊。\n\n: If you don't need scheduled redeployment, you can simply delete the `schedule` block.
translations.如果這個專案對您有幫助，請考慮 [Star Repo、推薦給朋友](https:: If this project helps you, please consider [Starring the Repo or recommending it to friends](https://github.com/ZhgChgLi/linkyee){:target="_blank"}, **or [buying me a coffee. Thank you for your support!](https://www.buymeacoffee.com/zhgchgli){:target="_blank"}**
translations.恭喜！部署成功，現在您可以修改設定檔案，將其替換為您的資料。🎉🎉🎉\n\n: Congratulations! Deployment successful. You can now edit the configuration file and replace it with your own information. 🎉🎉🎉
translations.您可以設置自訂的 GitHub Pages 網域， **例如我的： <https: You can set a custom GitHub Pages domain, **for example mine: <https://link.zhgchg.li>{:target="_blank"} .**
translations.掌握 HTML 原始檔案，可隨意修改排版、樣式、移除廣告、版權宣告； *(預設樣: Full control over the HTML source files allows you to freely modify layout, styles, remove ads, and copyright notices; *(the default style was created using GenAI ChatGPT)*
translations.有任何問題及指教歡迎 [與我聯絡](https://www.zhgchg.li/: If you have any questions or feedback, feel free to [contact me](https://www.zhgchg.li/contact){:target="_blank"}.
translations.歡迎提出 Issue，或透過 Pull Request 提交修正或貢獻。:)\n: Feel free to submit an Issue or contribute fixes via Pull Request. :)
translations.照本文簡單幾步就能完成設定部署\n: You can complete the setup and deployment in just a few simple steps according to this article.
translations.直接部署在 Github Pages 穩定、免費\n: Direct Deployment on GitHub Pages: Stable and Free
translations.編輯位於根目錄中的 config.yml 文件。\n\n: Edit the config.yml file located in the root directory.
translations.請求過於頻繁可能會響應 HTTP 429\n: Too many requests may result in an HTTP 429 response.
translations.預設情況下，專案每天會自動重新部署一次，以刷新插件的動態變數值。您可以在 [Gi: By default, the project automatically redeploys once a day to refresh the plugin's dynamic variable values. You can adjust the cron settings in [Github Action — Automatic build (.github/workflows/build.yml)](https://github.com/ZhgChgLi/linkyee/blob/main/.github/workflows/build.yml){:target="_blank"}:
